attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who capitalizes on GC-irrelevant status to gain freedom. Finishes with unconventional sprint tactics adapted to conditions.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Demonstrated ability to survive challenging conditions (wet roads) and execute technical sprints from reduced selections. Terrain profile unclear from limited data.
vulnerability: Requires GC-neutral status and race situation allowing large breakaway gaps. Effectiveness in head-to-head against pure sprinters or climbers unknown.
key_patterns: Adapts sprint technique to conditions rather than conventional methods (seated vs jumping in wet)
Succeeds from reduced breakaway selections requiring both endurance and finishing speed
form_trajectory: unknown: Single stage win shows capability but insufficient longitudinal data to assess trend
